title: Christow Light Up Santa Stop Here Sign, Outdoor Christmas Path Stake Decoration, Flashing Multi Coloured LED, Battery Operated with Timer (63cm)
features: LIGHT UP SANTA STOP HERE SIGN: Welcome Santa Claus to your home at Christmas this Light Up Santa Stop Here Sign from Christow. The sign measures 63cm (approx.) and is decorated with ‘Santa Stop Here!’ text to create a fun festive feature. Plus, it’s spectacularly illuminated by twinkling LEDs to catch Santa’s attention when he’s flying past at Christmas.

DOUBLE-SIDED NORTH POLE DESIGN: The sign is made from durable weatherproof plastic, making it more robust than a wooden sign. Also, it has a red and white striped pole and a snowy effect on top for a magical North Pole look. Because the sign is double-sided, there’s no danger of Santa Claus failing to read it when he’s busy delivering presents.

FLASH EFFECT & STATIC FUNCTION: The sign has cut-out star shapes surrounding the ‘Santa Stop Here!’ text. When switched on, multi-coloured LEDs flash through the cut-out shapes to illuminate the sign and create a twinkling star effect. If you don’t want the sign to flash, you can also choose a static function, so the LEDs emit a normal, consistent glow.

BATTERY OPERATED WITH TIMER FUNCTION: The Stop Here Sign is connected to a weatherproof battery box by a 1m cable to easily display anywhere outside your home. The battery pack requires 3 x AA batteries (not included). In addition, the battery pack has a timer function, enabling you to select a time for the sign to automatically light up at night.

GROUND STAKE & BASE INCLUDED: The sign includes an attachable ground stake to easily insert it into soft ground. For example, you can display it on your lawn or in a pot beside your front door. The sign also comes with an attachable round base which can be used instead of the stake to display it on hard surfaces. It looks fabulous displayed inside a front porch!
description: Product Description Light Up Santa Stop Here Sign What You Need to Know! Santa sign measures 63cm tall (excluding stake and base) Red and white colour scheme for a classic Christmas look Large ‘SANTA STOP HERE!’ text to grab Santa’s attention Beautifully illuminated by twinkling multi-coloured LEDs Includes an attachable 12cm ground stake to display outdoors Includes a sturdy attachable base to display inside your home Weatherproof battery box requires 3 x AA batteries (not included) Timer Function to automatically light up (6hrs on/18hrs off) Make the Festive Season Fun for Kids There’s no chance of kids waking up to an empty stocking with our Santa Stop Here Light Up Sign. Designed in fun festive colours and illuminated by twinkling LEDs. The sign has a durable weatherproof plastic construction and measures 63cm tall. Because it has ‘Santa Stop Here!’ text on both sides, it’s sure to grab Santa’s attention. Battery Powered for Easy Placement Because the sign is battery powered with a weatherproof battery box, it doesn’t require a plug socket. As a result, you can easily display it anywhere you want to. For flexible placement, we’ve designed the battery box with a 1m cable connecting it to the sign. The battery box is black with a black cable. Enchanting Twinkling Effect The sign has a snowy top and star shapes surrounding the text. When turned on, the snowy top and stars light up with flashing multi-coloured LEDs to create an enchanting light display. Timer Function Worried you’ll forget to turn the sign on and fail to get Santa’s attention? Well, fear not. Because the sign has a timer, you can set it to automatically light up at a time of your choosing. Stake for Outdoor Display Displaying the sign outside where Santa can easily see it? We’ve included a ground stake to insert it in the ground without it blowing over. Perfect for placing in a pot beside your front door! Easy to Assemble We’ve also included an attachable base to easily display the sign inside your home. It looks spectacular displayed beside a fireplace to greet Santa when he comes down your chimney!
